name: FreightCar America, Inc.
summary: FreightCar America, Inc. is a diversified manufacturer and supplier of railcars and railcar components, designing and manufacturing box cars, covered hoppers, open top hoppers, gondolas, intermodal and flat cars for bulk commodities and containerized freight in North America. The company also provides railcar rebody, repair, and conversion services, and supplies railcar parts. Founded in 1901, it operates a manufacturing facility in Castaños, Coahuila, Mexico, serving financial institutions, shippers, and railroads.
